arts.ttl: Barcelona star dropped due to disciplinary measure
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has been keen to install a Germanic discipline into his side since arriving, and that starts with punctuality. He has made it perfectly clear that those who do not arrive on time will face punishment. Under previous manager Xavi Hernandez, that was also the case, but under the Catalan, the punishment […] The post Barcelona star dropped due to disciplinary measure appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: New Barcelona revelation after Ronald Araujo release clause surprise
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo will be available for €65 million in the summer, but his release clause is only active for 10 days, according to Spanish media. New Barcelona revelation after Ronald Araujo release clause surprise

arts.ttl: WATCH: Robert Lewandowski gives Barcelona the lead with effort off the post
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Robert Lewandowski has added to his goal tally, breaking the deadlock at home to Rayo Vallecano for the Catalan giants. The Polish striker has converted his third penalty of the season to bring up 20 goals in La Liga, as he continues atop the Pichichi leaderboard. arts.ttl: Kounde dropped for Barca's clash with Rayo after being late again
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has long made it clear how important he views punctuality and has already dropped Kounde and Inaki Pena this season for poor time-keeping. According to Gerard Romero, Kounde was late for Flick's pre-match talk and has been sanctioned again.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make decision on Nico Williams transfer pursuit
arts.sum: Barcelona have been long-term admirers of Athletic Club's Nico Williams but weren't able to agree deal in last year's summer transfer window.
